name: Brown Sugar Crisps
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F. In a large bowl, beat together the sugars, margarine, egg, and vanilla until smooth and creamy. Stir in the baking mix and chopped nuts. Drop the dough by slightly rounded teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes, or until light brown. Remove from the cookie sheet immediately. Yield: About 3 1/2 dozen cookies.
Note: For high altitude baking (3500 to 6500 ft), reduce the amount of Bisquick baking mix to 1 1/2 cups and add an additional 1/2 cup all-purpose flour.
